synopsis: Collects (not listed in reading order) Dark Horse Extra (1998) #35-37 & 44-47, Star Wars (1998) #27-31, Star Wars: Hasbro/Toys “R” Us Exclusive (2002) #1-4, Star Wars: Jango Fett (2002) OGN SC, Star Wars: Jedi Quest (2001) #1-4, Star Wars: Starfighter – Crossbones (2002) #1-3, Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters (1999) #1 / Aurra Sing, and Star Wars: Zam Wesell (2002) OGN SC
title: Star Wars Omnibus: Menace Revealed
